deals.deal: Alice Waters' Peach & Goat Cheese Salad — Limited-Edition Summer Collab
deals.desc: A limited-edition seasonal salad created with chef Alice Waters, available nationwide via app, online, and delivery through August 10.

deals.deal: BOGO for $5 — Buy One Entrée, Get Another for $5
deals.desc: Use code BOGO5 at checkout to get a second whole sandwich, salad, soup, or bowl for just $5 with any qualifying purchase.

deals.deal: $9.99 Any Pizza, Any Crust, Any Toppings
deals.desc: Get any Domino's pizza with any crust and up to any toppings — including Parmesan Stuffed Crust — for $9.99 each.

deals.deal: Mix & Match $4.99 Menu — Up to 10 Half-Portions
deals.desc: Select up to 10 half-portion soups, sandwiches, or salads from the Mix & Match menu at ~40% off regular prices, plus one side per order.
Score any Arby's Slider for just $1.99 each at participating locations for a limited time.

deals.deal: $5 Value Meal — McDouble or McChicken Combo
deals.desc: Order through the McDonald's app to get a $5 meal including your choice of McDouble or McChicken, 4-pc McNuggets, small fries, and a small drink.
Get a Jr. Bacon Cheeseburger or Crispy Chicken BLT, 4-pc nuggets, small fries, and a small drink for $5 via the Wendy's app.
Get a Double Cheeseburger or Crispy Chicken Jr., 4-pc nuggets, small fries, and small drink for $5 daily via the BK app.

deals.deal: Moana Movie Meal Deal — Upgrade Any Combo for $1 More
deals.desc: Upgrade any Subway combo meal for just $1 extra to get a collectible Moana cup and a $15 Fandango promo code to see the film.
Grab a bucket of KFC fried chicken — Original or Extra Crispy — for $10 at participating locations this month.
Score 12 of Popeyes' wings or chicken tenders for just $12 for a limited time at participating locations.

deals.deal: $7 Meal Deal — 3-Piece Chicken Strip or Cheeseburger Meal
deals.desc: Get a 3-piece Chicken Strip Meal Deal or Original Cheeseburger Meal Deal for $7, and upgrade to a Blizzard for $2 more.
Order online through the Shake Shack app or website at participating locations to unlock $2 sodas, $4 fries, and $6 shakes — excluding limited-time shakes.

deals.deal: Limited-Edition Eagle Cup — $10.99 with Free Medium Beverage
deals.desc: Pick up the Dunkin' Eagle Cup for $10.99 and receive a free medium beverage plus a code for a $3 medium drink or Refresher daily for 30 days.
Text LOVEIT26 to 568348 to unlock a $5 off any $10+ in-store or app purchase at Cold Stone Creamery through July 31.
